title: PRChecksResult
description: Output of `bin/wait-for-pr-checks.sh`. Reports the terminal state of a polling loop that watches a GitHub PR's checks until they all pass, any one fails, or a timeout is reached. Soft-skips when `gh` is missing or unauthenticated.

target.description: Repo path the wait was initiated from.

oneOf.description: PR number unresolved; only valid when outcome is `skipped`.

outcome.description: pass = every check completed with a passing conclusion. fail = at least one check completed with a failing conclusion (the loop bails immediately on first failure). timeout = the polling deadline was hit before all checks completed. skipped = gh missing/unauthenticated or PR couldn't be resolved. no-checks = the PR returned an empty checks list (clean exit, treat as pass for gating).

elapsed_seconds.description: Wall-clock seconds the wait took. 0 in the skipped path.

checks.description: Per-check terminal state. Mirrors the shape `gh pr checks --json` returns. Empty in the skipped path.
